zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Houghton是Thomas Houghton的女兒，於1284年出生。她於大約1307年與Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton在英國斯塔福爾斯恩頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1357年享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Houghton是Thomas Houghton的女儿，于1284年出生。她于大约1307年与Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton在英国斯塔福爾斯恩頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1357年享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Houghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Haughton
meanings: English: habitational name from Haughton (Cheshire, Lancashire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Staffordshire), or Haughton le Skerne (Durham). The placenames derive from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .
Irish: adopted for Ó hEacháin ‘descendant of Eachán’, a pet form of the personal name Eachaidh (see Hoey ).
Irish: adopted for Ó hEachtair ‘descendant of Eachtair’, a personal name of uncertain origin. Compare Hoctor .

variants.name: Hufton
meanings: English: habitational name; probably from Stony Houghton in Pleasley (Derbyshire), the name of which derives from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Houghton was born in 1284 as the daughter of Thomas Houghton. She married Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton about 1307, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1357, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Houghton est née en 1284, fille de Thomas Houghton. Elle a épousé Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton environ 1307, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1357, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Houghton wurde 1284, als Tochter von Thomas Houghton geboren. Sie hat um 1307 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1357 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Houghton è nata il nel 1284 come figlia di Thomas Houghton. Lei sposato Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton circa 1307, nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1357, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Houghtonは1284年にThomas Houghtonの娘として生まれた。約1307年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンでRoger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1357年に73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Houghton(은)는 1284년 Thomas Houghton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1307년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1357년 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Houghton nasceu em 1284 filha de Thomas Houghton. Ela casou-se com Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton aproximadamente 1307, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1357, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Houghton родилась в 1284 г. Её отца звали Thomas Houghton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton около 1307 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1357 г. в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Houghton nació en 1284 como hija de Thomas Houghton. Se casó con Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton aproximadamente 1307, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1357, a la edad de 73 años.
